hero.subtitle: Sync your bookings via iCal, find reliable cleaners and automate scheduling, payments and invoices in a few clicks

forEveryone.heading: A simple solution for hosts and cleaners

host.title: Manage your rentals effortlessly
host.description: Everything you need to run your short-term rental without the hassle.
host.item1: Find reliable cleaners near your properties
host.item4: Track each cleaning in real time
host.footer: Save time and reduce the mental burden of management

cleaner.title: For Cleaners
cleaner.description: Connect your booking platforms and automatically import reservations
cleaner.item2: Manage your schedule easily from the app
cleaner.footer: Work more simply and find more assignments

step1.title: Create your listing
step1.description: Create your listing on the platform and add the necessary information about your property.

step2.title: Add a cleaner
step2.description: Add a cleaner to your listing according to your preferences and requirements.

step3.title: Connect your iCal
step3.description: Connect your Airbnb calendar (iCal) to automatically sync your bookings in real time.

step4.title: Auto-detect check-outs
step4.description: The app detects check-outs and automatically recommends cleanings to be performed.

step5.title: Confirm the cleaning
step5.description: You confirm the cleaning and validate the service with the cleaner directly in the app.

step6.title: Photo proof sent
step6.description: The cleaning is completed and a photo proof is sent to you for verification.

step7.title: Automatic payment
step7.description: Once the cleaning is validated, payment is automatically sent to the cleaner.

icalSync.title: Automatic iCal Sync
icalSync.description: Connect once and let the app handle all your booking imports automatically.

marketplace.title: Cleaner Marketplace
marketplace.description: Browse and hire verified, experienced cleaners near your properties.

smartAssignment.title: Smart Assignment
smartAssignment.description: Cleanings are automatically assigned based on availability and proximity.

payments.title: Payment Management
payments.description: Secure, automatic payments processed as soon as cleanings are validated.

invoices.title: Automatic Invoices
invoices.description: Professional invoices generated and sent automatically for every job.

tracking.title: Real-time Tracking
tracking.description: Monitor every cleaning in real time with live status updates and photo proofs.

fewerMessages.title: Fewer messages to manage
fewerMessages.description:
Stop back-and-forth messaging.
Automate confirmations and updates.

fewerErrors.title: Fewer scheduling errors
fewerErrors.description:
Smart calendar sync prevents double
bookings and missed cleanings.

lessStress.title: Less operational stress
lessStress.description:
Let the app handle the logistics while
you focus on your guests.

centralized.title: Centralized organization
centralized.description:
All your properties, cleaners, tasks, and
payments in one place.

download.title: Download the app
download.description: Manage your Airbnb cleanings directly from your phone. Available on iOS and Android.
download.bottomTitle: Start automating your household chores today
